_instructions.purpose: Manual image placement for this ebook. Fill out to control cover, titlepage, and illustration placement. Leave untouched for default behavior.
_instructions.how_to_add_images: Work with Apprentice to populate this file. Each entry places one image at a specific location in the book.
_instructions.cover_override: Place any image in images/cover-override/ to skip automated cover search. Set cover.credit below for imprint attribution.

fields.image: Filename in images/ folder, or a URL to download
fields.at: Where to place it. Options: 'before:chapter-3', 'after:chapter-3', 'replace:titlepage', 'replace:imprint', 'before:section:Songs of Innocence'
fields.fullpage: true = gets its own XHTML page, false = inline in text
fields.caption: Optional caption text displayed below the image
fields.credit: Attribution for imprint page (e.g. 'William Blake, 1826. Library of Congress.')

cover.title: Patriotic illustration of children - C.M. Burd - 1921.jpg
